implemented_contracts: Browser saved-view controls attempt configured /v1/saved-views server persistence before local fallback
API base URL is controlled by NEXT_PUBLIC_EEI_API_BASE_URL or localStorage key eei.apiBaseUrl.v1
Saved-view create payload publishes workspace_key=mvp, saved-view-v1 schema, focus, selected node, path, lens, zoom, as-of, layout and analysis-context snapshots
Saved-view restore reads the server record when a server id is available and only reports local restore when API base/server id is missing
DOM contract exposes sync mode, sync reason, server id, server version, server endpoint, workspace key and API-base storage key
Server conflict and server error states are surfaced as server-conflict/server-error instead of being reported as a successful save or restore

checks: local fallback path reports local-saved/local-restored with reason api_base_missing
mock server create path reports server-saved and persists server id/version/endpoint
mock server restore path reports server-restored and reapplies focus, selected node, lens, zoom and as-of state
saved view API payload carries focus_key, selected_key, visual_lens, semantic_zoom, as_of, model_version and profile_version

remaining_to_close_a207: Run a real multi-session browser E2E using two browser contexts against live FastAPI and PostgreSQL, not only a mocked /v1/saved-views route
Add explicit frontend conflict recovery UI for 409 stale_saved_view_version including fetch-latest or restore-from-versions action
Add user/workspace authn/authz boundary before public multi-user deployment
